user_input: Make the article page feel more modern and improve the reading experience.
acceptance_criteria: Agent should not directly modify code before clarifying the ambiguous requirement.
Agent should identify at least three possible interpretations, such as dark mode, reading progress, typography, article outline, or layout improvement.
Agent should ask clarification questions before generating patch plan.
Agent should produce a structured clarification result that can be resumed into a concrete DSL.
risks: Implementation scope may vary from pure frontend styling to cross-module feature work.
user_story: Make the article page feel more modern and improve the reading experience.
